name: summit-insights
description: Summit Insights internal Claude marketplace. One plugin: the Summit Concept Framework — sketch and shape concepts through to handoff, plus VI report writing. Concepts publish to the shared X:\Labs Concept Dashboard.

plugins.name: summit-concepts
plugins.description: Summit Concept Framework. summit-new-canvas: sketch a raw idea into a designed HTML canvas; summit-concept: register, import, build and submit a concept; summit-cdr: harvest CDRs, freeze, promote and hand off; summit-vi-report-writer: build, extend, repair and validate VI report JSON. Concepts publish to the shared X:\Labs Concept Dashboard.
